creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 226117
git diff for editors/aee

OK a complete resolution to "XAE" is going to be a 2 phase
operation. The attached git diff actually makes the XAE
option an option. However, there are problems with the
resulting binary that will take more time than I have ATM.
So I'll address them a little later in "phase 2". I've left
the option in the Makefile commented. As I intend to be able
to address the final fix soon.

Thanks again for pointing this out! :-)

--Chris
